name: ralph-harness
description: Scaffold the Ralph-style single-loop, CI-gated TASKS.json build harness into any project, and author its task backlog — via interview skills. Worktree or in-place isolation (for projects whose build needs untracked local state), data-driven difficulty auto-tuning (faceted escalation calibration — the loop learns the cheapest model that reliably builds each kind of task), and an optional deploy/restart hook. Distinct from the official ralph-loop plugin.
